__workflow__: Edit this file, then from the repo root run: python3 scripts/generate_schedule.py (updates index.html schedule table + knowledge_base/schedule.txt). Commit all three.
special_events: May 6: Private catering at Avengers Wedding
seasonal_notes:
During summer months (June-August), we add Thursday evening service at the Beach Boardwalk from 6:00 PM - 9:00 PM.

During winter months (December-February), we may adjust hours based on weather. Check our social media for daily updates.
find_us: We post our daily location on Instagram and Facebook. Follow us for real-time updates, especially during weather changes or special pop-up locations.
